Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-AE Assign Reviewers when followed by SW-Reviewer Declined compared to when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined occurs

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer No Response in cases where no agreement is reached
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the subsequent Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include a successful reviewer assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Unavailable
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers to be repeated after an initial SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-AE Recommendation overdue in cases where the AE recommendation is delayed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Average duration of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants leading to SW-EIC Major Revision versus those leading to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Total time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Selection is now due when the assignment occurs after the deadline
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Minimum time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to Assign a Different Editor in cases requiring editor reassignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and Unassign Reviewer when reviewer replacement is needed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Unassign Reviewer'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in streamlined review paths without reminders or declines
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
